productDisplayName: Lee Women Navy Blue Beach T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, has graphic print on the front and brand name printed at the back Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Revel in the fineries of art, music and film on weekends with this tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The stylish print on the front makes this T-shirt a true piece of art. Team this with jeans or bermudas and chill out in style. Model statistics The product is a size L on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
